title: Anathallis escalerensis
taxonomy: Anathallis escalerensis is classified in the plant kingdom as part of the monocot family Orchidaceae, commonly known as the orchid family. It belongs to the subfamily Pleurothallidinae, a group of orchids that are native to the Americas. The genus Anathallis is a subgenus of the larger genus Pleurothallis, which is characterized by its small, delicate flowers. Anathallis escalerensis is a species of orchid that is endemic to a specific region. Its classification is further refined to the species level, Anathallis escalerensis, within the larger family Orchidaceae.
